companions.name: Ash
companions.description: Black wolf with ember markings and amber eyes. Brave, stubborn, protective. Evolution: Ash Cub → Ashwolf → Dire Ashwolf → Ember Fang → Ash King.
companions.imagePrompt: A massive black wolf with ember markings and amber eyes standing beside a young ranger, ruined city walls beyond, realistic epic fantasy art, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, book illustration quality

companions.name: Whisper
companions.description: Silver hawk with moon feathers and golden eyes. Intelligent, mischievous, curious — Nora's scout and messenger.
companions.imagePrompt: A silver hawk with moonlit feathers perched on an explorer's arm above fractured horizons, realistic epic fantasy art, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, book illustration quality

companions.name: Bramble
companions.description: Fox-like creature with leaf fur and green eyes. Playful, gentle — future symbol of Sanctuary.
companions.imagePrompt: A fox-like creature with leaf-textured fur and green eyes beside a young healer apprentice, realistic epic fantasy art, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, book illustration quality

companions.name: Tempest
companions.description: Blue scales, lightning-edged wings. Proud, fearless, competitive — argues with Adrian. Not a true dragon.
companions.imagePrompt: A blue storm drake with lightning-edged wings beside a calm guardian in white armor, realistic epic fantasy art, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, book illustration quality

companions.name: Lumen
companions.description: Crystal spirit form, silver-blue light. Wise, sarcastic, ancient — perspective without easy answers. Late saga only.
companions.imagePrompt: A crystalline aether spirit of silver-blue light orbiting a spatial mage, realistic epic fantasy art, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, book illustration quality

companions.name: Astralis
companions.description: Celestial dragon of constellations. Mythic endgame ally — alliance never ownership.
companions.imagePrompt: A celestial dragon woven from constellations above a fractured sky, realistic epic fantasy art, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, book illustration quality
